title: max_media_per_post() is a trivial const-wrapper function
description: media::max_media_per_post() is a public function that does nothing except return the private constant MAX_MEDIA_PER_POST. Per standards: prefer boring, direct solutions. The constant should be pub const MAX_MEDIA_PER_POST: usize = 8 so callers can use it directly and the compiler can fold it. A function call for a constant value forces a non-inlinable (in debug) call, and prevents use in const contexts (array sizes, etc.). There is no invariant that justifies the wrapper.
close_reason: Fixed: replaced max_media_per_post() function with pub const MAX_MEDIA.
